AuctionResult.description: One auction with nested `results[]` and `products[]` (offered/allocated/requested capacity, ATC, auction price, bid-gate times).

data.description: Records for the requested time window. Each row carries `dateTimeUtc` plus endpoint-specific fields (e.g. `hub_<ZONE>` for net positions, `border_<FROM>_<TO>` for exchange-shaped data).
Records for the requested page. Shape depends on the endpoint; CNEC records include `dateTimeUtc`, `cnecName`, `contingencies[]`, and a set of `ptdf_<HUB>` columns.

totalRowsWithFilter.description: Total rows matching the filter, ignoring pagination. Issue the first call with `Take=0` to read this without transferring data.

ProblemDetails.description: RFC 7807 problem detail returned on 4xx/5xx by the Publication Tool's ASP.NET Core middleware.

OwsmpApiKey.description: Issued by JAO helpdesk (`helpdesk@jao.eu`, subject `[API] Token Request`) after accepting the T&Cs.
OwsmpApiKey.name: AUTH_API_KEY

PublicationToolBearer.description: Anonymous bearer token extracted from the SPA at `https://publicationtool.jao.eu/core/`. Role is `Guest`; the API is effectively public.

info.description:
Auto-generated by `scripts/build_openapi.jl` from a declarative endpoint
table. JAO publishes neither an OpenAPI spec nor a Postman collection;
this spec consolidates the surface mined from the `jao-py` open-source
client (Publication Tool) and the `API_User_Guide_v1.0.pdf` (OWSMP
auctions).

The Publication Tool runs ASP.NET Core with Swashbuckle disabled; its
errors are RFC 7807 `application/problem+json`. OWSMP returns bare JSON
arrays. The Utility Tool (SOAP/WSDL) is intentionally out of scope.

Operations live under SYNTHETIC paths (`/publicationtool/core/data/...`,
`/owsmp/...`) so OpenAPI's `path + method` key-uniqueness constraint is
satisfied while preserving one Julia function per logical query. The
generated client's `pre_request_hook` collapses the synthetic prefix back
to the real base URL listed under `servers` at request time.
info.title: Joint Allocation Office (JAO) REST API

get.description: Auction results for a corridor / horizon over a date range (max 31 days). Each entry includes nested `results[]` and `products[]` carrying offered/allocated/requested capacity, ATC, auction price, and bid-gate timestamps. Omit `todate` for the `Yearly` horizon (server ignores it).

parameters.description: Corridor identifier. Enumerate via `getcorridors`.
parameters.name: corridor

parameters.description: Auction horizon. Enumerate via `gethorizons`.
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Inclusive start date, `YYYY-MM-DD`.
parameters.name: fromdate

parameters.description: Inclusive end date, `YYYY-MM-DD`. Omit for `Yearly` horizon (server ignores it). Max 31-day window.
parameters.name: todate

parameters.description: Set to `1` to include shadow auction results.
parameters.name: shadow

get.description: Bid-level records for one auction (identified by `auctionid`, e.g. `<CORRIDOR>-M-BASE-------YYMM01-01`).

parameters.description: Auction identifier, e.g. `<CORRIDOR>-M-BASE-------YYMM01-01` for a monthly base auction.
parameters.name: auctionid

get.description: Enumerate corridor identifiers usable for `getauctions`/`getcurtailment`.
Curtailment events on a corridor over a date range. Records carry `curtailmentPeriodStart`/`curtailmentPeriodStop`.

parameters.description: Corridor identifier. Enumerate via `getcorridors`.
parameters.name: corridor

parameters.description: Inclusive start date, `YYYY-MM-DD`.
parameters.name: fromdate

parameters.description: Inclusive end date, `YYYY-MM-DD`. Omit for `Yearly` horizon (server ignores it). Max 31-day window.
parameters.name: todate

get.description: Enumerate horizon values — `Yearly`, `Monthly`, `Weekly`, `Daily`, `Intraday`.
External allocation constraints imposed on the flow-based domain (up and down per zone).

parameters.description: Inclusive start of the requested window, ISO 8601 UTC with millisecond precision (`yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.000Z`). Practical limit: two days per call; DST boundaries may force single-day chunks.
parameters.name: FromUtc

parameters.description: Exclusive end of the requested window, ISO 8601 UTC with millisecond precision (`yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.000Z`).
parameters.name: ToUtc

get.description: Final computation of the Core CCR flow-based domain for the requested market time unit: critical network elements, their contingencies, RAMs, and PDFFs per bidding-zone hub. Paginate via `Skip`/`Take`; use `Filter` to narrow by CNEC, TSO, or presolved state.

parameters.description: Exclusive end of the market time unit, ISO 8601 UTC. Typically `FromUtc + 1h` for domain queries.
parameters.name: ToUtc

parameters.description: Pagination offset (rows to skip).
parameters.name: Skip

parameters.description: Page size. Use `0` first to read `totalRowsWithFilter`, then paginate. jao-py uses 5000.
parameters.name: Take

parameters.description: JSON-encoded filter object. Common keys: `CnecName` (string), `Contingency` (string), `Presolved` (bool), `Tso` (array of EIC codes). Example: `{"Presolved":true}`.
parameters.name: Filter

servers.description: Real base URL for synthetic prefix `/publicationtool/core` (collapsed by the client hook).
Real base URL for synthetic prefix `/publicationtool/nordic` (collapsed by the client hook).
Real base URL for synthetic prefix `/publicationtool/ibwt` (collapsed by the client hook).
Real base URL for synthetic prefix `/publicationtool/coreID` (collapsed by the client hook).
Real base URL for synthetic prefix `/owsmp` (collapsed by the client hook).

tags.description: Core CCR day-ahead flow-based market coupling — domain, net positions, shadow prices, validations, monitoring.
tags.name: PublicationToolCoreDA

tags.description: Nordic CCR day-ahead — subset of Core (no `lta`, `netPos`, `allocationConstraint`, `alphaFactor`, `priceSpread`, `scheduledExchanges`) plus `fbDomainShadowPrice`; `d2CF` renamed to `cgmForeCast`; filter key `NonRedundant` replaces `Presolved`.
tags.name: PublicationToolNordicDA

tags.description: Italy North CCR — `CCR_*` for day-ahead, `CCR_id*` for intraday. Smaller surface than Core (CNECs, forecasts, TTC/NTC, allocation constraints).
tags.name: PublicationToolItalyNorth

tags.description: Core CCR intraday continuous clearing (window A). Endpoints carry the variant prefix `IDCCa_`; the `monitoring` system endpoint is shared with Core (see PublicationToolCoreDA tag).
tags.name: PublicationToolCoreIDCCa

tags.description: Explicit cross-border capacity auctions (OWSMP). API key required (`AUTH_API_KEY` header).
tags.name: OwsmpAuctions
